## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential investment opportunity and discuss fwd.digital's business model and growth strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is a fast-growing AI-powered content marketing service, hitting $4.2M ARR with 24 employees and 34% profit margin](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Unique model combines AI workflows, international talent, and managed services to deliver high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Strong product-market fit with 12-month contracts ranging $9K-$40K/mo from clients like Reddit, HeyGen, and Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Founder considering raising capital to accelerate growth, platformization, and marketplace development](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Founder Experience

  - [Marcel Santilli founded fwd.digital after success with content marketing at IBM, HP, and startups](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Developed AI-assisted content strategies that grew DeepGram traffic 24x in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Launched workshops teaching the process, which evolved into the current service offering](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

### Business Model and Service Offering

  - [Provide end-to-end content marketing services using AI-powered workflows and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Pod structure: 1 strategist, 1-2 managing editors, 2-3 support staff per 4-5 client accounts](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Services include content strategy, creation, publishing, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Pricing ranges from $9K to $40K per month on 12-month contracts](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [25% cost structure due to international hiring and AI efficiencies](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Technology and Competitive Advantage

  - [Custom AI workflows for content strategy, creation, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Building client-specific knowledge bases for improved content quality](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [Developing additional work streams (e.g., programmatic SEO, interview-based content) for upsells](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
  - [Focus on riding the AI model improvement wave and creating reinforcing data flywheel](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)

### Growth and Future Plans

  - [Currently at $4.2M ARR, profitable with 24 employees](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Strong pipeline with 34 potential deals in progress](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)
  - [Considering raising capital to accelerate growth, improve platform, and develop marketplace capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Vision to expand beyond content into other AI-powered professional services](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)

### Potential Investment Opportunity

  - [8VC expressed interest in the business model and growth potential](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
  - [Marcel open to exploring funding options to accelerate growth](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1917.0)
  - [Both parties agree to continue the conversation and explore potential next steps](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=2096.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jack (8VC) to consider follow-up conversation structure and reach out](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=2097.0)
  - [Marcel to continue focusing on business growth while remaining open to funding discussions](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=2021.0)
  - [Both parties to explore potential synergies and investment opportunities as the relationship develops](https://fathom.video/share/HdJwuJjTGfDsfUwX8yh9ydAxa4QZQwRx?tab=summary&timestamp=2088.0)
